channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: What to watch in Tuesday’s primaries as Democrats try to defend California and make inroads in Iowa
item.description: California’s governor race is lacking star power this year. Big names like Kamala Harris and Alex Padilla have opted out, leaving a crowded field of about 60 candidates.

item.title: South Carolina jury finds store owner not guilty of murder in killing of Black teen
Bus driver in fatal Virginia crash had previous speeding charges
